title: ExportPoints Statement
parameters:
fileName	String expression containing the specific file to be exported.

The extention must be ".pts".  You cannot specify a file path and fileName doesn't have any effect from ChDisk.  See ChDisk for the details.

destination	Specify the path and file name to save the file.

The extension must be ".pts".  See ChDisk for the details.
description:
ExportPoints copies a specified point file to a folder on the PC.

If the file already exists in the folder, it wil be overwritten.
see_also:
Exports a point file to the specified path.

LoadPoints

SavePoints

FileExists

FolderExists

ExportPoints Statement Example

Function main
 LoadPoints "robot1.pts"
 ' ...
 SavePoints "robot1.pts"
 If FolderExists("c:\mypoints\") Then

    ExportPoints "robot1.pts", "c:\mypoints\model1.pts"
 EndIf

Fend
examples:
Function main LoadPoints "robot1.pts" ' ... SavePoints "robot1.pts" If FolderExists("c:\mypoints\") Then
    ExportPoints "robot1.pts", "c:\mypoints\model1.pts" EndIf
Fend
